sentences.translation: Zahvalnost mijenja način na koji gledamo na život.
sentences.translationEn: Gratitude changes the way we see life.

sentences.arabic: كَتَبَتْ أَمَلٌ كُلَّ لَيْلَةٍ ثَلَاثَةَ أَشْيَاءَ تَشْكُرُ عَلَيْهَا.
sentences.translation: Amal je svake noći pisala tri stvari na kojima je zahvalna.
sentences.translationEn: Amal wrote every night three things she was grateful for.

sentences.arabic: بَعْدَ أُسْبُوعٍ لَاحَظَتْ أَنَّهَا أَكْثَرُ سَعَادَةً.
sentences.translation: Nakon sedmice primijetila je da je sretnija.
sentences.translationEn: After a week she noticed that she was happier.

sentences.arabic: الأَشْيَاءُ الصَّغِيرَةُ فِي حَيَاتِنَا تَسْتَحِقُّ الشُّكْرَ.
sentences.translation: Male stvari u našem životu zaslužuju zahvalnost.
sentences.translationEn: The small things in our life deserve gratitude.
